hero.title: Full-Stack Developer with an OPS / DevOps focus
hero.description: Passionate about development, I am constantly driven by designing innovative solutions and continuously improving my technical skills.

about.about_subtitle: Discover my background, skills, and approach to modern software development.
about.career_description: A passionate web developer with over 3 years of experience, I design modern, high-performance, user-centered applications. My growth is driven by continuous technology monitoring and hands-on projects focused on quality, maintainability, and performance.
about.education_degree: Professional Bachelor's Degree — Software Engineering & Databases
about.education_institution: University of Fianarantsoa · National School of Computer Science
about.secondary_institution: Saint-Joseph de Cluny High School, Fianarantsoa

auto_flow.title: Development of an AI-based Email Analysis Automation App with n8n
auto_flow.description: Design and development of a complete solution ensuring reliability, performance, and data synchronization between front-end and back-end. Implemented a dynamic interface to visualize analyzed emails, a real-time system via WebSocket, and integration of data processed by n8n workflows with filtering and organization.

planning.title: Project Planning and Tracking Application
planning.description: Developed a project management application including project, sprint, and task creation, progress tracking, email invitations, drag-and-drop task updates, meeting management synchronized with Google Calendar, real-time chat, asynchronous tasks handling, and full containerization for easy deployment.

mandika_apk.title: Mandika Application Development
mandika_apk.description: Full development of the app including image capture and enhancement, form configuration, data extraction via a configurable OCR engine, and creation of interfaces for visualization, editing, and export (CSV, JSON, PDF), all in accordance with the specifications.

stock_flow.title: Stock Management Application
stock_flow.description: Designed and developed a professional stock management application allowing product management, updates, and categorization, with automatic alerts for low stock levels and a complete inventory tracking and adjustment module.

sfyritech_meeting.title: Web Solution for Appointment Management with Google Calendar Sync
sfyritech_meeting.description: Designed and developed a real-time appointment management application synchronized with users' Google Calendar. Front-end development with Quasar and Angular.js, back-end with NestJS, implementing a RESTful API and WebSocket for real-time communication.

hello_archi.title: API Development for Hello Archi Platform
hello_archi.description: Optimized existing code to improve performance and usability. Developed new features according to client requirements and fixed bugs to enhance overall user experience.

open_delivery.title: Full-Stack Developer
open_delivery.description: Designed and developed front-end and back-end aspects of websites, applications, and web services. Implemented software solutions according to specifications and developed features tailored to client needs.
